calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Choon Ja Kim was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Sue Kim was placed under oath and served as Korean speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Service in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Haewon Helena Kim.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-17-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Reset To Jul-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
